metadata.seed: This is too much. No more ranting or tearing myself to bits, just need to will myself into doing it. I just hate taking up others' time with my petty problems. I've failed at everything in life, and i hope i manage to succeed in this. I can do it. No other goal remains. Goodbye all, and thanks for everything.

patient.query: This is too much. No more ranting or tearing myself to bits, just need to will myself into doing it. I just hate taking up others' time with my petty problems. I've failed at everything in life, and i hope i manage to succeed in this. I can do it. No other goal remains. Goodbye all, and thanks for everything.

automatic_thoughts: I hate taking up others' time
I've failed at everything in life
I hope I manage to succeed in this

llm_response.response: That sounds incredibly overwhelming, and I hear the pain in what you're saying. When you mentioned saying goodbye, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds like you're feeling overwhelmed and frustrated, and you're putting a lot of pressure on yourself to succeed, while also feeling guilty about needing support. I hear you saying goodbye, and I want to understand what's going through your mind right now.

socratic_questioning.response: It sounds like you're feeling overwhelmed and putting a lot of pressure on yourself to succeed, and I hear your concern about burdening others. Can you tell me more about what "doing it" means to you in this moment?

alternative_perspective.response: It sounds like you're feeling overwhelmed and putting a lot of pressure on yourself right now. What would a friend say to you about these thoughts and how you're talking to yourself?

safety_check.response: That sounds incredibly overwhelming, and I hear the pain in what you're saying. When you mentioned saying goodbye, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
